title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules that Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei use to decide what is worth building with Claude. The video frames these principles as a way to avoid building the wrong products, whether for side projects, businesses, or operational improvements.
